name: ai-git-assistant
description: Generate commit messages and create or update README files from your codebase.

commands.title: AI Git Assistant: Generate Commit Message
AI Git Assistant: Create or Update README

aiCommitMessageGenerator.apiKey.markdownDescription: OpenAI API key used to generate commit messages and README content.

aiCommitMessageGenerator.provider.markdownDescription: AI provider used for commit message and README generation.

aiCommitMessageGenerator.model.markdownDescription: OpenAI model used for commit message and README generation.

aiCommitMessageGenerator.ollamaModel.markdownDescription: Ollama model used when the provider is set to ollama.

aiCommitMessageGenerator.ollamaBaseUrl.markdownDescription: Base URL for the local Ollama server.

aiCommitMessageGenerator.useSelectionFir.markdownDescription: Use the active editor selection before falling back to the staged diff.
